falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by demonstrating strong upward momentum contrary to the pattern's implied bearish bias

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would confirm a market top scenario, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' verdict which implies continued consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX index drops below 12 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme complacency in volatility would falsify the pattern's implied risk-on environment, showing market conditions are diverging from the bottom_2024_aug template

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
